creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
On uninstall there is a lua error:

[131i386-default-foo-job-06] [1/1] Deinstalling python39-3.9.16_3...
[131i386-default-foo-job-06] [1/1] Deleting files for python39-3.9.16_3: .......... done
pkg-static: Failed to execute lua trigger: attempt to index a nil value
pkg-static: lua script failed


[131i386-default-foo-job-06] [1/1] Deinstalling py39-sphinx-5.3.0,1...
[131i386-default-foo-job-06] [1/1] Deleting files for py39-sphinx-5.3.0,1: .......... done
Cleaning stale bytecode files...
pkg-static: Failed to execute lua trigger: attempt to index a nil value
pkg-static: lua script failed
